MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Guru Sharanam is present. Represented by I. Solanki.
Attorney Arnold Walter Evje appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Jasper Hammond and Laronda Love are present.
Attorney Peter Chess representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-05-2012 remains on calendar.
